surface: Flow Validator Guidance: MCP Server (CLI stdio)

assertionsTested.reason: Platform mapping logic is covered by deterministic unit tests for macOS ARM64/x64 and Linux x64/ARM64, and tests pass.
evidence: node --test /Users/moritzbierling/werk/repos/spikes/packages/spikes-mcp/test.js -> pass 11, fail 0; includes: detectPlatform returns correct target for macOS ARM64/macOS x64/Linux x64/Linux ARM64
python3 scan of packages/spikes-mcp/test.js confirmed required cases present: {"macOS ARM64":true,"macOS x64":true,"Linux x64":true,"Linux ARM64":true}

assertionsTested.reason: From a clean wrapper cache, npx spikes-mcp failed to download the darwin-arm64 binary (HTTP 404), so startup did not succeed through the normal first-run path.
evidence: npx --yes /Users/moritzbierling/werk/repos/spikes/packages/spikes-mcp --help -> exit 1; stderr: 'downloading binary for aarch64-apple-darwin... Binary not found (HTTP 404)'
After manually seeding cache with local cli/target/debug/spikes, initialize succeeds: response serverInfo.name=spikes-mcp (shows spawn path works when binary exists)

assertionsTested.reason: npm package bin mapping exists and points spikes-mcp to the wrapper entrypoint.
mcp install subcommand is present and help exits successfully with usage text.
evidence: python subprocess check for cargo run -- mcp install --help -> {"returncode":0,"contains_usage":true,"contains_options":true,"ok":true}
Help output includes: 'Usage: spikes mcp install [OPTIONS]'

assertionsTested.reason: mcp install produces valid JSON config including mcpServers.spikes for Claude/Desktop-style configuration.
evidence: cargo run -- mcp install --json returns JSON with detected_clients[0].config.mcpServers.spikes

frictions.description: First-run wrapper download path returned HTTP 404 for aarch64-apple-darwin release asset, preventing normal npx startup validation.
frictions.resolution: Seeded wrapper cache with local built spikes binary to isolate and validate spawn/stdio initialize behavior separately.

summary: Tested 5 assertions: 4 passed, 1 failed (VAL-DISC-011 failed on clean-cache first-run due missing GitHub release asset download; wrapper spawn behavior itself works with cached binary).
